name: LINGO Phone Agent
description: A Naptha module that wraps the LINGO AI phone agent service, enabling multi-agent workflows to deploy, query, and interact with business phone agents. This module exposes LINGO's full API surface — call handling, caller memory (Kirk system), transcripts, and agent-to-agent messaging — as callable Naptha tools.

LINGO_API_KEY.description: LINGO API key — obtain from https://app.lingo-agent.ai/settings/api

tools.name: deploy_agent
tools.description: Deploy a new LINGO phone agent for a business. The agent immediately begins answering inbound calls on the specified phone number.

phone_number.description: E.164 phone number (e.g. '+14155551234') or '+new' to provision a fresh number

system_prompt.description: Natural language instructions for the agent — describe the business, tone, hours, and capabilities

tools.name: get_agent
tools.description: Retrieve status, configuration, and usage statistics for a LINGO phone agent.

output_schema.description: Full AgentResponse including stats and Kirk memory ID

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a text message to a LINGO agent for agent-to-agent interaction. The agent responds using its full context — ideal for pre-call briefing, querying caller history, or injecting real-time context.

content.description: The message to send to the agent

caller_id.description: Optional: load Kirk memory for this caller's phone number

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata (e.g., source agent name, CRM record ID)

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Read the Kirk caller memory store for a LINGO agent. Returns structured records of every caller's history, preferences, and sentiment.

caller_id.description: Filter by specific caller E.164 phone number

tools.name: get_transcripts
tools.description: Retrieve call and SMS transcripts for a LINGO agent. Each transcript includes the full conversation, detected intent, extracted entities, and sentiment score.

tools.name: train_agent
tools.description: Update a LINGO agent's system prompt, add knowledge base entries, or adjust escalation triggers. Changes take effect immediately for new calls.

system_prompt.description: Full replacement system prompt (omit to keep existing)

system_prompt_patch.description: Additive patch to append to the existing prompt

knowledge_entries.description: FAQ-style entries to add to the knowledge store

change_summary.description: Short description of the update (stored in training history)

tools.name: decommission_agent
tools.description: Permanently decommission a LINGO phone agent. The agent stops answering calls immediately. Data is retained for 90 days.

example_workflows.name: Booking Agent Integration
example_workflows.description: A Naptha orchestrator deploys a LINGO phone agent for a dental practice. A booking agent pre-loads caller context before each call and writes appointment confirmations to a calendar after each call ends.
steps: deploy_agent — spin up phone agent with dental office system prompt
booking_agent sends context via send_message before caller is expected
After call ends, booking_agent calls get_transcripts to extract appointment details
Booking agent writes appointment to Google Calendar via separate Naptha module

example_workflows.name: CRM Sync Agent
example_workflows.description: A CRM agent polls LINGO transcripts hourly, extracts structured data (name, intent, entities), and upserts records into a CRM.
steps: CRM agent calls get_transcripts with from=last_sync_time
For each transcript, agent parses intent and entities
CRM agent upserts contact and interaction record via CRM Naptha module
CRM agent calls send_message to update Kirk memory with CRM record ID
